SeqReads R6 class

Source: R/seq_reads.R
SeqReadsR6.Rd

SeqReads R6 class

SeqReads R6 class

Details

Internal R6 generator backing seq_reads(). Inherits from SeqElementR6.

Super class

SeqPlotR::SeqElement -> SeqReads

Public fields

bam

Path to the BAM file.

region

Sorted GRanges of windows to load.

gr_reads

GRanges of loaded reads with qname and y mcols.

link_spans

GRanges of mate-pair spans with y mcols.

nrows

Maximum row index used for read packing.

min_mapq

Minimum mapping quality threshold.

max_reads

Maximum number of reads to load.

max_width

Guardrail on per-window width in bp.

sort_by

Row-packing sort order ("insert_length" or "start").

link_mates

Whether to draw mate-pair link lines.

show_strand

Whether to render strand chevrons.

Methods

Public methods

  • SeqReadsR6$new()

  • SeqReadsR6$getYLimits()

  • SeqReadsR6$.infer_scale_y()

  • SeqReadsR6$prep()

  • SeqReadsR6$draw()

  • SeqReadsR6$clone()

Inherited methods
  • SeqPlotR::SeqElement$collect_legend_keys()
  • SeqPlotR::SeqElement$resolve()

Method new()

Construct a SeqReadsR6 from a BAM file and region.

Usage

SeqReadsR6$new(
  bam,
  region,
  min_mapq = 0L,
  max_reads = 20000L,
  max_width = 100000L,
  sort_by = c("insert_length", "start"),
  link_mates = TRUE,
  show_strand = TRUE,
  aesthetics = list(),
  ...
)

Arguments

bam

Character. Path to an indexed BAM file.

region

GRanges of windows to load.

min_mapq

Integer. Minimum mapping quality. Default 0.

max_reads

Integer. Maximum total reads to load. Default 20000.

max_width

Integer. Maximum allowed window width in bp. Default 100000.

sort_by

Character. "insert_length" (default) or "start".

link_mates

Logical. Default TRUE.

show_strand

Logical. Default TRUE.

aesthetics

Named list of optional aesthetics. See seq_reads().

...

Reserved.

Method getYLimits()

Return the y-axis limits for the row-packed reads.

Usage

SeqReadsR6$getYLimits()

Method .infer_scale_y()

Infer a continuous y scale covering the row-packed reads. Used by seq_plot$layoutGrid() to pick a primary y scale when the parent track does not define one.

Usage

SeqReadsR6$.infer_scale_y()

Method prep()

Convert reads and link spans to canvas NPC coordinates, one entry per window.

Usage

SeqReadsR6$prep(layout_track, track_windows)

Arguments

layout_track

Per-window panel metadata list.

track_windows

Track's windows GRanges.

Method draw()

Render reads (as chevron polygons) and mate-pair links.

Usage

SeqReadsR6$draw()

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

SeqReadsR6$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
